title: Host kbsc + realtime consumers validation against Docker mutations
description: Confirm Kanban UI and wall-clock consumers receive create/update/comment/close events from Docker-originated mutations in near real time.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Progress: Host kbsc consumed Docker-originated MQTT mutations during live run. Evidence: kbsc API returned HTTP 200 for tskl-eo2.9.7 with Docker-authored comment after MQTT mutation sequence. Next: close validation task and attach operator runbook. Risk/Blocker: none.
